questions.question: A  standard full-time job is typically 8 hours long, what can be considered as an 8-hour block?
options: A) A full day at the office
B) A quarter of a day
questions.explanation: A full day at the office

questions.question: What is the typical duration of an 8-hour workday in many countries?
How many hours are typically worked in an 8 hour block?
How many hours is 8 hours equal to when considering a 24 hour clock.
How many units are in an 8 hour work block?
